top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
  AND t.Date = '2012-08-26'
  AND t.Time >= '00:00:00' 
  AND t.Time < '12:00:00';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-26' 
  AND c.Currency = 'CZK' 
  AND t.Time BETWEEN '00:00:00' AND '11:59:59';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
  AND t.Date = '2012-08-26'
  AND t.Time >= '00:00:00' 
  AND t.Time < '12:00:00';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c USING (CustomerID)
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-26' 
  AND c.Currency = 'CZK' 
  AND CAST(t.Time AS TEXT) >= '00:00:00' 
  AND CAST(t.Time AS TEXT) < '12:00:00';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-26' 
  AND c.Currency = 'CZK' 
  AND t.Time BETWEEN '00:00:00' AND '11:59:59';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
  AND t.Date = '2012-08-26'
  AND t.Time >= '00:00:00' 
  AND t.Time < '12:00:00';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c USING (CustomerID)
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-26' 
  AND c.Currency = 'CZK' 
  AND CAST(t.Time AS TEXT) >= '00:00:00' 
  AND CAST(t.Time AS TEXT) < '12:00:00';

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE t.Date = '2012-08-26' 
  AND c.Currency = 'CZK' 
  AND t.Time BETWEEN '00:00:00' AND '11:59:59';

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
  AND t.Date = '2012-08-26'
  AND t.Time >= '00:00:00' 
  AND t.Time < '12:00:00';
